message:
chore: expand gitignore for agent cargo caches, app bundles, and config backups

Add missing patterns for ephemeral files produced by concurrent agent
workflows:

- .cargo-*/ (hyphen variant) alongside existing .cargo_*/ (underscore)
  to cover all per-agent Cargo cache directory naming conventions
- storage.sqlite3.bak for agent mail database backup files (existing
  patterns only covered storage.sqlite3 and storage.sqlite3-* with dash)
- *.app/ for macOS application bundles generated during local builds
  (e.g., FrankenTerm.app/)
- Agent tool MCP config timestamped backups (.cline.mcp.json.*,
  .codex.mcp.json.*, .cursor.mcp.json.*, .gemini.mcp.json.*,
  .opencode.json.*, .windsurf.mcp.json.*, .claude/*.bak)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -101,13 +101,15 @@ docs/formal/*.tlc.log
 
 # Per-agent Cargo caches (concurrent agent builds use isolated registries)
 .cargo_*/
+.cargo-*/
 
 # Remote compilation helper cache
 .rch/
 
 # Agent mail SQLite databases (runtime state, not project data)
 storage.sqlite3
 storage.sqlite3-*
+storage.sqlite3.bak
 
 # Beads backup files (auto-generated during sync/migration)
 .beads/*.bak*
@@ -118,3 +120,15 @@ storage.sqlite3-*
 # ML model caches (fastembed, ONNX, etc.)
 .fastembed_cache/
 .onnx_cache/
+
+# macOS app bundles (build output)
+*.app/
+
+# Agent tool MCP config backups (timestamped .bak files)
+.claude/*.bak
+.cline.mcp.json.*
+.codex.mcp.json.*
+.cursor.mcp.json.*
+.gemini.mcp.json.*
+.opencode.json.*
+.windsurf.mcp.json.*
